embeds.description: Created page with "\{\{Map \|image =  SatelliteOfficeRender1.png \|label = Example \|label2 = Example \|label3 = Example \}\} '''Satellite Office''' is a [map](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Maps>) released in [v0.8.0](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/V0.8.0>).  It is [B-Man's](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/B-Man>) map.  == Design == The map is in an abandoned office, probably has  a relation to [B-Man](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/B-Man>). The map is a blueish fog and is mildly gloomy. The map also contains construction equipments, meaning that this map is on a process of either renovation or other process.  == Interactive Map ==..."

embeds.title: Taunts ((N!)  +678)
embeds.description: Created page with "\{\{aetitle\|Taunts\|t a u n t s\}\} \{\{hr\}\} \<center\> '''Taunts''' is a mechanic that allows one to mock an [alter ego](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Alter_Egos>). It plays an animation and sound that will alert the alter ego, giving away the player's position.  Additionally, it also grants [Karma](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Karma>) if the '''taunt''' was used near an alter ego. \<\/center\>  \{\{QuickLink \|[125px\|link=All About You](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/File:AllAboutYouIcon.png>) \|[All About You](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/All_About_You>) \|[125px\|link=Bird Brain](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/File:BirdBrainIcon.png>) \|[Bird Brain](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Bird_Brain>)..."
